details.test: Task 1: Setup monthly AutoPay with $120 cap on 7th using bank account
Task 2: View detailed usage for highest-usage month in 2023
Task 3: Start new residential water service with lowest deposit option
Task 4: Report a street water leak with appropriate category and severity
Task 5: Enroll in two conservation rebate programs totaling at least $75
Task 6: Restrict communication preferences to SMS alerts for outages and billing only
Task 7: Use bill estimator to switch to cheaper plan for 6,000 gallons
Task 8: Schedule a one-time $65 payment for 2026-04-15 using saved Visa
Task 9: Register two attendees for earliest free conservation workshop
Task 10: Subscribe to SMS-only updates for nearest outage to 500 Maple Ave
